title: Greek Dip
ingredients: 2 8-ounce blocks of cream cheese, at room temperature
1 8-ounce container of feta cheese, plain or flavored
1 tablespoon chopped fresh oregano or 1 teaspoon dried oregano
1-2 tablespoons chopped fresh basil or 1 ½ teaspoon dried basil
instructions: Place all ingredients in food processor.
Drizzle in olive oil while on low speed to make spreading consistency.
Refrigerate for at least 2 hours for flavors to marry.
notes: Best if served at room temperature.
Serve with pita chips, pita bread wedges, veggies, or as a topping with Greek chicken sandwiches.
Optional: Add ¼ cup sundried tomatoes packed in oil to ingredients for a rosy glow to the dip color.
Recipe from beloved friend, Lisa Ames
